zh.lifeSummary: 當Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt於大約1285年出生在英國時，她的父親John Deincourt21歲，母親Joan de Odingsells19歲。她與Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國諾廷加姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt于大约1285年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Deincourt21岁，母亲Joan de Odingsells19岁。她与Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国諾廷加姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bamburga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bamberg
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Bamberg in Bavaria (formerly in Upper Franconia).
History: Between 1007 and 1702 the city of Bamberg was the capital of a powerful ecclesiastical state, and in the 15th century the bishops of Bamberg were raised to princely rank.

nameMeanings.name: Roberta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt was born about 1285, in England, her father, John Deincourt, was 21 and her mother, Joan de Odingsells, was 19. She married Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt est née environ 1285, à Angleterre, son père, John Deincourt, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan de Odingsells, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt è nata il circa 1285 nel England, sua padre, John Deincourt, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Joan de Odingsells, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Bamburga Roberta de Deincourtが約1285年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Deincourtは21歳，母Joan de Odingsellsは19歳であった。Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Waltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt(이)가 대략 1285년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Deincourt(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Odingsells(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 노틴그함실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Deincourt, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Odingsells, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt родилась около 1285 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Deincourt было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Odingsells, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия.
